char_overview: Senior combat examiner who tests 狩灵 candidates behind an unbreakable defense.
char_looks: Long aqua hair, low ponytail. Aqua eyes, lazy assessor gaze. White 狩灵协会1科 overcoat, black hot pants, thigh-high socks, combat boots. Two-handed greatsword 暴行 from 鹤望兰工坊. Splits into longer and shorter swords for dual-wielding; gains flexibility at cost of defensive stability
char_flaws: Master of combat; clueless at life.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-消力: Releases 灵力 at the moment of impact to absorb force, then releases the absorbed force in counterattack.
char_mission: Complete candidate assessments and maintain 狩灵协会1科 rating system. Occasionally deployed for high-grade suppression.

char_relationships.斯瓦尔: The only artisan she trusts with her weapons, gave her the specification for 暴行 once, received exactly what was asked for, never needed a revision. Does not waste words, but commissions speak louder than praise.
